query: SELECT id, title, startTime, endTime, eventType, sessionType, capacity, currentBookings, isFree, price FROM availabilitySlots WHERE startTime >= NOW() ORDER BY startTime ASC LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4HtU1c2nK4A5Wb2.root --database M2v4Dnk4LCsJQ3Qwy7fUfL --execute SELECT id, title, startTime, endTime, eventType, sessionType, capacity, currentBookings, isFree, price FROM availabilitySlots WHERE startTime >= NOW() ORDER BY startTime ASC LIMIT 10;
